testcase.name: test_register_new_user

failure.message:
AssertionError: Email mismatch assert 'test_user_c12c72bb@may.test' == 'TEST_user_c12c72bb@may.test'
- TEST_user_c12c72bb@may.test ? ^^^^ + test_user_c12c72bb@may.test ? ^^^^

testcase.failure: tests/test_auth.py:64: in test_register_new_user assert data["user"]["email"] == test_email, "Email mismatch" E AssertionError: Email mismatch E assert 'test_user_c12c72bb@may.test' == 'TEST_user_c12c72bb@may.test' E E - TEST_user_c12c72bb@may.test E ? ^^^^ E + test_user_c12c72bb@may.test E ? ^^^^
